## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

List the automated and manual checks you ran.

## Authorization, security, and privacy

Describe any impact on authorized subscriber access, cookies, retained
content, generated files, remote HTML, credentials, or email delivery. Write
`None` if not applicable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] Documentation updated where appropriate
- [ ] No cookies, credentials, subscriber content, or generated artifacts committed
- [ ] Backward compatibility and configuration impact considered
- [ ] Access remains limited to content the user is authorized to access and retain
